title: Endoorman
description:
Poor enderman... Must be tough to be 3 blocks tall when you can't duck...

-------------------------

Just messed around a bit with a thing that I do to get enderpearls in the game!

-------------------------

A very huge thank you to my friend Remba, who did the voices of all zombies and, most importantly, our loveable blocky creature from the end!

He does some really beautiful photos, if you ask me, go check them out! http://www.flickr.com/photos/mfregiaroph/

His YouTube account: http://www.youtube.com/user/Remba92

-------------------------

SPOILER ALERT!
Some people said that the enderman could have just used his ability to teleport in, seems legit, but I've got an explanation for that, so, instead of copy-paste it all over the comment section I'll put it here!

Being a good mob he wanted to pay the admission first, teleport would have been useless since all the room is two blocks high.
While he could just call the zombie-ticket-man to come out and take his golden ingot, he didn't really want to let anyone know his little issue.
